The ObsFilter class — Filtering observations¶

New in version 0.1.

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

class observations.ObsFilter(Observation)¶

ObsFilter inherits from the observations.observation.Observation class and disables all the numerical operators as these do not make sense on arrays of Booleans.

Public methods¶

__call__(value = None):
Parameters:value (Observation or an array) – The ObsFilter will select observations from the array value where its contents have True values.

returns a one-dimensional array containing all values taken from value matching the True values in the ObsFilter. If value is not given, returns the array of observations, just like the values method.
